scripts.build:libs: cp node_modules/alpinejs/dist/cdn.min.js public/js/alpine.min.js && cp node_modules/htmx.org/dist/htmx.min.js public/js/htmx.min.js
scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:libs && vite build
scripts.test:e2e:desktop: node tests/E2E/fixtures/reset-db.js && playwright test --project='Desktop Chrome' --project='Desktop Chrome Dark' --project='Desktop Safari' --project='Desktop Safari Dark'
scripts.test:e2e:mobile: node tests/E2E/fixtures/reset-db.js && playwright test --project='Mobile Safari – iPhone 14 Pro' --project='Mobile Safari – iPhone 14 Pro Dark' --project='Mobile Chrome – Pixel 7' --project='Mobile Chrome – Pixel 7 Dark'
scripts.test:e2e:safari: node tests/E2E/fixtures/reset-db.js && playwright test --project='Desktop Safari' --project='Desktop Safari Dark' --project='Mobile Safari – iPhone 14 Pro' --project='Mobile Safari – iPhone 14 Pro Dark'
